en: Will, if you just sit around the house all afternoon and never develop any outside interests,
ko: 음, 만약 네가 오후 내내 집에만 앉아 있고 외부 관심사를 전혀 발전시키지 않으면,

en: you'll become a very, very shallow person.
ko: 매우, 매우 얕은 사람이 될 거야.

en: You have beautiful hair. I know.
Let me see that hat. OK. I don't think it works with that outfit.
ko: 그 옷과는 잘 안 어울리는 것 같아. 힐러리, 잠깐 이야기해도 될까?

en: Hillary, can I talk to you for a minute? Not now, Ash. My show starts in five minutes.
ko: 지금은 안 돼, 애쉬. 내 쇼가 5분 후에 시작해.

en: It's important, isn't it? I can tell. I have like a third sense about these things.
I'm like... an art gallery to me is like...
Well, you know, it's like, OK... OK, when I walk into an art gallery, it's like...
Um... I mean, OK, if I had to choose, right?
Well, you know, it's like, I mean... Leave me alone!
Now, were there mitigating circumstances that facilitated the perpetrator to commit any malfeasance?
ko: 자, 범죄자가 어떤 불법 행위를 저지르도록 촉진한 완화적 상황이 있었나요?

en: Well, I wouldn't put it in those words exactly.
